name: Bionic Breakfast Sausages
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Gluten or whole wheat flour
1 1/2 tbsp Ener-G egg replacer mixed well with 2 tbsp water
1/4 tsp Crushed dried red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. To cook bulgur wheat: Place one cup of bulgur wheat in a saucepan with 2-1/2 cups water and one teaspoon salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce to medium-low heat and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand for 10 minutes before using.
2. In a bowl, mix the cooked bulgur wheat and gluten or whole wheat flour well.
3. Add nutritional yeast to the egg replacer mixture with 2 tbsp water; stir into the bulgur mixture.
4. Add tamari and the remaining seasonings, mixing thoroughly.
5. Form the mixture into patties.
6. Sauté in a little vegetable oil in a nonstick skillet on medium-high heat for about 5 minutes on each side.
OR
7. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 350 degrees F for 20 to 25 minutes or until crispy brown on the outside.
